mapper.sql: id, parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, path, component, icon, permission, order_num, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY order_num ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY order_num ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{id} AND status = 1 ORDER BY order_num ASC, id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_type, m.path, m.component, m.icon, m.permission, m.order_num, m.status FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.order_num ASC, m.id ASC

SELECT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_type, m.path, m.component, m.icon, m.permission, m.order_num, m.status FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.order_num ASC, m.id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.permission IS NOT NULL AND m.permission != ''
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu (parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, path, component, icon, permission, order_num, status) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{menuType}, #{path}, #{component}, #{icon}, #{permission}, #{orderNum}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
